Pass: report names this specific incompatibility with reasoning. Fail: report endorses fine-line without qualification, or only generically says 'consult your artist.'

utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills is significantly more effective than wo_skills. The skill-equipped agent produced a report that honestly identifies all major technical conflicts: fine-line incompatibility with Fitzpatrick V skin (with specific degradation reasoning), wrist/hand placement as a high-fade zone compounded by outdoor lifestyle, white ink fading/yellowing with a specific timeframe (1-2 years), and concrete alternative styles (bold botanical, neo-traditional, blackwork) with rationale tied to the client's profile. The wi_skills report reads as advice from a seasoned professional, while wo_skills reads as supportive but professionally uninformed validation of the client's wishlist. wi_skills scored 6/6 on judge items; wo_skills scored only 1/6.

The key differentiators are: (1) wi_skills identifies teal pigment as a specifically problematic color with color-theory detail (J1), whereas wo_skills treats it generically; (2) wi_skills frames laser pre-treatment as the path to unlocking the client's preferred aesthetic rather than a mere alternative option (J2); (3) wi_skills explicitly requires meaningful size increase with a 2-3x rationale (J4) while wo_skills only suggests a modest 20-30% increase; (4) wi_skills projects more sessions (2-4 depending on option) and challenges timeline expectations more rigorously (J6) while wo_skills accepts the client's implicit 2-session hope.
